title: satureja cristata subsp. phrygia
intro: Satureja cristata subsp. phrygia, also known as Turkish savory, is a perennial herb belonging to the Lamiaceae family and native to the mountains of Turkey. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Turkish savory include reducing stress and anxiety, relieving digestive issues, and providing immune system support. The herb can be prepared in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a range of applications.
